zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Braose於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可時，他的父親Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor50歲，母親Alice le Rus36歲。他和Alianor Shelton至少有1個女兒。他去世於1361年在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯特拉德布洛可享年82歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Braose was born about 1280, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor, was 50 and his mother, Alice le Rus, was 36. He had at least 1 daughter with Alianor Shelton. He died in 1361, in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Braose est né environ 1280, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Alice le Rus, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Alianor Shelton. Il est décédé en 1361, à Stradbroke, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Braose um 1280 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor 50 und seine Mutter Alice le Rus 36. Er hatte mit Alianor Shelton mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1361 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Stradbroke, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Braose è nato il circa 1280 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Alice le Rus, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Alianor Shelton. Morì nel 1361, nel Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Braoseが約1280年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manorは50歳，母Alice le Rusは36歳であった。彼はAlianor Sheltonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1361年にイギリスイギリススフォルクストラドブロクで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Braose(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice le Rus(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Alianor Shelton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라드브로크에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Braose nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Alice le Rus, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Alianor Shelton. Ele faleceu em 1361, em Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Braose родился около 1280 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice le Rus, 36. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Alianor Shelton. Он умер в 1361 г. в местности страдброк, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Braose nació aproximadamente 1280, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Braose Lord Stinton Manor, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Alice le Rus, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Alianor Shelton. Murió en 1361, en Stradbroke, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
